name: slop
description: Codex plugin for discovering and controlling SLOP-enabled desktop and web applications through MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Observe and control local apps through Codex
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to SLOP-enabled desktop and web applications. Discover available providers, inject their live semantic state into Codex, and act through five stable MCP tools backed by the shared discovery layer.
defaultPrompt: List the SLOP-enabled apps available on this computer
Connect to my kanban board and inspect its current state
Use the visible app actions to update several items in one batch
